debug_info.goal:
case corec
n : ℕ
F : TypeVec.{u} (n + 1) → Type u
inst✝ : MvQPF F
α : TypeVec.{u} n
self : @MvQPF.StateCofixShrunk n F inst✝ α
f : @MvQPF.Coalg n F α → F (α ::: @MvQPF.StateCofixShrunk n F inst✝ α) :=
  fun self =>
    map
      (TypeVec.id :::
        @MvQPF.StateCofixShrunk.corec n F inst✝ α (@MvQPF.Coalg.σ n F α self) (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α self))
      (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest n F α self)
a b : @MvQPF.Coalg n F α
h_bisim :
  let un := @MvQPF.Coalg.union n F inst✝ α a b;
  ∃ R, @MvQPF.Coalg.IsBisim n F inst✝ α un R ∧ R (Sum.inl (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α a)) (Sum.inr (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α b))
σ✝ : Type u
un : σ✝ → F (α ::: σ✝)
d' : σ✝
h_un : @MvQPF.Coalg.union n F inst✝ α a b = @MvQPF.Coalg.corec n F α σ✝ un d'
⊢ map
      (TypeVec.id ::: fun init =>
        @ofLarge n F inst✝ α
          (Quot.mk (@MvQPF.Coalg.Bisim n F inst✝ α)
            (@MvQPF.Coalg.corec n F α (@MvQPF.Coalg.σ n F α a) (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α a) init)))
      (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α a (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α a)) =
    map
      (TypeVec.id ::: fun init =>
        @ofLarge n F inst✝ α
          (Quot.mk (@MvQPF.Coalg.Bisim n F inst✝ α)
            (@MvQPF.Coalg.corec n F α (@MvQPF.Coalg.σ n F α b) (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α b) init)))
      (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α b (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α b))

failed_attempts:
rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, h_bisim, h_R⟩
    rw [←MvQPF.liftR_eq_iff, MvQPF.liftR_map_iff]
    refine MvQPF.liftR_mono ?_ ?_
    · intro i x y h
      cases i
      · simp only [RelLast, TypeVec.RelLast] at h; simp [h]
      · simp only [RelLast, TypeVec.RelLast] at h
        apply congr_arg
        apply Quot.sound
        use R
        exact ⟨by rw [h_un] at h_bisim; exact h_bisim, h⟩
    · specialize h_bisim _ _ h_R
      rw [←Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, ←Coalg.union_dest_eq_right] at h_bisim
      rw [←MvQPF.liftR_map_iff] at h_bisim
      exact h_bisim
  Quot.lift f h (CShrink.toLarge self)

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR, Rab⟩
    rw [← MvFunctor.map_map, ← MvFunctor.map_map]
    apply MvFunctor.map_eq_map_of_liftR (union_dest_eq_left _ _ _ ▸ union_dest_eq_right _ _ _ ▸ hR _ _ Rab)
    intro i x y h
    induction i using Fin.lastCases
    · apply congr_arg
      apply Quot.sound
      exact ⟨R, hR, h⟩
    · subst h
      rfl
  Quot.lift f h (StateCofixShrunk.toLarge self)

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, h_bisim, h_pair⟩
    let U := a.union b
    let g (s : U.σ) : StateCofixShrunk F α := .ofLarge <| Quot.mk _ <| Coalg.corec U.dest' s
    have hg : ∀ s t, R s t → g s = g t := by
      intro s t hr
      simp only [g]
      congr 1
      apply Quot.sound
      use R, h_bisim, hr
    let embed (c : Coalg F α) (inj : c.σ → U.σ)
        (h_dest : ∀ s, (TypeVec.id ::: inj) <$$> c.dest' s = U.dest' (inj s)) :
        ∀ s, ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec c.dest' s)) = g (inj s) := by
      intro s
      simp only [g]
      congr 1
      apply Quot.sound
      use fun x y => y = inj x
      constructor
      · intro x y heq
        subst heq
        rw [← h_dest]
        rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff]
        use (TypeVec.id ::: fun k => (k, inj k)) <$$> c.dest' x
        simp [MvFunctor.map_map, TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.id, Function.comp]
        refine ⟨rfl, rfl, fun i j => by cases i <;> simp; rfl⟩
      · rfl
    have ha := embed a Sum.inl (Coalg.union_dest_eq_left a b)
    have hb := embed b Sum.inr (Coalg.union_dest_eq_right a b)
    simp only [ha, hb]
    rw [← MvFunctor.map_map, ← MvFunctor.map_map]
    rw [Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right]
    apply MvQPF.map_eq_map_of_liftR
    · apply h_bisim
      exact h_pair
    · intro i x y hxy
      cases i
      · simp at hxy; subst hxy; rfl
      · simp; apply hg; exact hxy
  Quot.lift f h self.toLarge

end
end StateCofixShrunk

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR, hRinit⟩
    let π : a.σ ⊕ b.σ → StateCofixShrunk F α :=
      fun s => .ofLarge <| Quot.mk _ <| Coalg.corec un s
    have hπ : ∀ s t, R s t → π s = π t := by
      intro s t hst
      apply CShrink.equivShrink.injective
      apply Quot.sound
      use fun x y => ∃ u v, x = .inl u ∧ y = .inr v ∧ R u v
      constructor
      · intro x y h; rcases h with ⟨u, v, rfl, rfl, hruv⟩
        simp only [Coalg.union, Coalg.dest, Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right, h_un]
        rw [MvFunctor.liftR_map_iff, MvFunctor.liftR_map_iff]
        refine MvFunctor.LiftR_mono (fun x y => ?_) (hR _ _ hruv)
        rintro _ _ (rfl | h); { simp }; exact ⟨_, _, rfl, rfl, h⟩
      · exact ⟨s, t, rfl, rfl, hst⟩
    have ha : corec a.dest' = π ∘ .inl := by
      ext s; apply CShrink.equivShrink.injective; apply Quot.sound
      use fun x y => y = .inl x
      constructor
      · intro x y h; subst h
        simp [Coalg.union, Coalg.dest, Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, h_un]
        rw [MvFunctor.liftR_map_iff]; apply MvFunctor.LiftR_refl
        intro i; cases i <;> simp
      · rfl
    have hb : corec b.dest' = π ∘ .inr := by
      ext s; apply CShrink.equivShrink.injective; apply Quot.sound
      use fun x y => y = .inr x
      constructor
      · intro x y h; subst h
        simp [Coalg.union, Coalg.dest, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right, h_un]
        rw [MvFunctor.liftR_map_iff]; apply MvFunctor.LiftR_refl
        intro i; cases i <;> simp
      · rfl
    rw [ha, hb]
    simp only [Function.comp_apply, ← MvFunctor.map_map, Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right, h_un]
    rw [h_un] at hRinit
    apply MvFunctor.map_eq_map_of_liftR (RelLast α R) (hR _ _ hRinit)
    rintro x y (rfl | h) <;> simp [hπ _ _ h]
  Quot.lift f h (StateCofixShrunk.toLarge self)

exact h_eq a x Sum.inl (union_dest_eq_left _ _)
      
    have hb : f b = (TypeVec.id ::: g) <$$> U.dest' (.inr b.s) := by
      rw [← union_dest_eq_right, MvFunctor.map_map]
      congr; funext i x; cases i <;> simp [f, corec, StateCofixFinal.corec]
      exact h_eq b x Sum.inr (union_dest_eq_right _ _)

    rw [ha, hb]
    have h_lift := hR _ _ Rab
    rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_lift
    rcases h_lift with ⟨z, h1, h2, h3⟩
    rw [←h1, ←h2, MvFunctor.map_map, MvFunctor.map_map]
    congr; funext i x
    cases i <;> simp
    · specialize h3 _ x; simp at h3; exact h3
    · specialize h3 _ x; simp at h3; obtain ⟨u, v, huv⟩ := h3
      simp only [g]; congr 1
      apply Quot.sound
      use fun x y => match x, y with | .inl x, .inr y => R x y | _, _ => False
      refine ⟨?_, by simp [huv]⟩
      intro x y hxy
      split at hxy <;> try contradiction
      subst_vars
      rw [union_dest_eq_left, union_dest_eq_right]
      refine MvQPF.LiftR_monotone (R := RelLast _ R) ?_ (hR _ _ hxy)
      intro i a b h; cases i <;> simp [h]

  Quot.lift f h self

· rintro _ _ ⟨x, y, hr, rfl, rfl⟩
        simp only [Cofix.dest_corec]
        have := hR _ _ hr
        rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at this ⊢
        rcases this with ⟨z, h1, h2, h3⟩
        use z, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec un) ⊚ h1, (TypeVec.id ::: Cofix.corec un) ⊚ h2
        refine ⟨by simp [abs_map, abs_repr, MvFunctor.map_map, TypeVec.comp], by simp [abs_map, abs_repr, MvFunctor.map_map, TypeVec.comp], ?_⟩
        intro i j
        specialize h3 i j
        cases i <;> simp at h3 ⊢
        · exact h3
        · exact ⟨_, _, h3, rfl, rfl⟩
      · exact ⟨u, v, huv, rfl, rfl⟩
  Quot.lift f h self

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, h_is_bisim, h_pair⟩
    rw [←h_un] at h_is_bisim h_pair
    
    let g (s : _) : StateCofixShrunk F α := .ofLarge <| Quot.mk _ <| Coalg.corec un s
    
    have hg : ∀ s t, R s t → g s = g t := by
      intro s t hr
      apply congr_arg; apply Quot.sound
      use fun | .inl x, .inr y => R x y | _, _ => False
      constructor
      · rintro _ _ ⟨x, y, hxy⟩; simp only
        rw [Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right]
        let R' := RelLast (α ::: (un.σ ⊕ un.σ)) (fun | .inl x, .inr y => R x y | _, _ => False)
        have H := h_is_bisim _ _ hxy
        rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at H ⊢
        rcases H with ⟨z, h1, h2, h3⟩
        use (TypeVec.id ::: fun p => (Sum.inl p.1, Sum.inr p.2)) <$$> z
        simp [h1, h2, MvFunctor.map_map]
        intro i j
        cases i <;> simp
        · apply h3
        · apply h3
      · exact hr

    have ha (s) : .ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec a.dest' s)) = g (.inl s) := by
      apply congr_arg; apply Quot.sound
      use fun | .inl x, .inr y => y = Sum.inl x | _, _ => False
      constructor
      · rintro _ _ ⟨x, _, rfl⟩; simp only
        rw [Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right, ←h_un, Coalg.union_dest_eq_left]
        rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff]
        use (TypeVec.id ::: fun s => (Sum.inl s, Sum.inr (Sum.inl s))) <$$> (a.dest' x)
        simp [MvFunctor.map_map]
        intro i j; cases i <;> simp
      · rfl

    have hb (s) : .ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec b.dest' s)) = g (.inr s) := by
      apply congr_arg; apply Quot.sound
      use fun | .inl x, .inr y => y = Sum.inr x | _, _ => False
      constructor
      · rintro _ _ ⟨x, _, rfl⟩; simp only
        rw [Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right, ←h_un, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right]
        rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff]
        use (TypeVec.id ::: fun s => (Sum.inl s, Sum.inr (Sum.inr s))) <$$> (b.dest' x)
        simp [MvFunctor.map_map]
        intro i j; cases i <;> simp
      · rfl

    rw [show (fun init => .ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec a.dest' init))) = g ∘ Sum.inl from funext ha]
    rw [show (fun init => .ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec b.dest' init))) = g ∘ Sum.inr from funext hb]
    rw [←MvFunctor.map_map, ←MvFunctor.map_map, ←h_un, Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right]
    apply MvFunctor.map_eq_map_of_liftR (RelLast _ R)
    · intro i x y h; cases i <;> simp at h; try simp [h]
      apply hg _ _ h
    · apply h_is_bisim _ _ h_pair

  Quot.lift f h (.toLarge self)

apply Quot.sound; use fun x y => y = inj x
      refine ⟨fun _ _ h => ?_, rfl⟩; subst h; rw [h_inj, MvQPF.liftR_iff]
      use (fun k => ⟨k, (TypeVec.id ::: inj) k⟩) <$$> c.dest' s
      simp [MvFunctor.map_map]; constructor <;> rfl

    have ha := h_hom a Sum.inl (union_dest_eq_left a b)
    have hb := h_hom b Sum.inr (union_dest_eq_right a b)
    simp only [f, Coalg.dest]
    rw [funext ha, funext hb]
    simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.comp_assoc, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id]
    rw [union_dest_eq_left, union_dest_eq_right]

    rcases MvQPF.liftR_iff.mp (hR _ _ Rab) with ⟨z, h1, h2⟩
    rw [← h1, ← h2, MvFunctor.map_map, MvFunctor.map_map]
    congr; ext ⟨x, y⟩; simp only [TypeVec.comp, Function.comp_apply]
    cases x <;> cases y
    · rfl
    · contradiction
    · contradiction
    · simp only [TypeVec.id, TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.splitFun, ku]
      apply StateCofixShrunk.toLarge.injective
      simp [StateCofixShrunk.toLarge, StateCofixShrunk.ofLarge, CShrink.toLarge_ofLarge]
      apply Quot.sound; exact ⟨R, hR, (by assumption)⟩

  Quot.lift f h (StateCofixShrunk.toLarge self)

apply congr_arg; apply (CShrink.equivShrink _).symm.injective; apply StateCofixFinal.equivCofix.injective
        dsimp [StateCofixFinal.equivCofix, StateCofixFinal.toCofix, Coalg.toCofix]
        apply MvQPF.Cofix.bisim (fun u v => ∃ s, u = Cofix.corec a.dest' s ∧ v = Cofix.corec U.dest' (.inl s))
        · rintro _ _ ⟨s, rfl, rfl⟩
          rw [Cofix.dest_corec, Cofix.dest_corec, ←Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, MvQPF.liftR_iff]
          use (MvFunctor.map (TypeVec.id ::: fun s => (Cofix.corec a.dest' s, Cofix.corec U.dest' (.inl s))) (a.dest' s))
          simp [MvFunctor.map_map, TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.id, TypeVec.appendFun]
          constructor
          · apply MvFunctor.id_map
          · constructor
            · apply MvFunctor.id_map
            · intro i j; cases i <;> simp [RelLast, TypeVec.RelLast]
              exact ⟨j, rfl, rfl⟩
        · exact ⟨x, rfl, rfl⟩

    have hb : (TypeVec.id ::: corec b.dest') = G ⊚ (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inr) := by
       funext i x; cases i
       · rfl
       · simp [G, corec, StateCofixFinal.corec, Coalg.corec, TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.id, TypeVec.appendFun]
         apply congr_arg; apply (CShrink.equivShrink _).symm.injective; apply StateCofixFinal.equivCofix.injective
         dsimp [StateCofixFinal.equivCofix, StateCofixFinal.toCofix, Coalg.toCofix]
         apply MvQPF.Cofix.bisim (fun u v => ∃ s, u = Cofix.corec b.dest' s ∧ v = Cofix.corec U.dest' (.inr s))
         · rintro _ _ ⟨s, rfl, rfl⟩
           rw [Cofix.dest_corec, Cofix.dest_corec, ←Coalg.union_dest_eq_right, MvQPF.liftR_iff]
           use (MvFunctor.map (TypeVec.id ::: fun s => (Cofix.corec b.dest' s, Cofix.corec U.dest' (.inr s))) (b.dest' s))
           simp [MvFunctor.map_map, TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.id, TypeVec.appendFun]
           constructor
           · apply MvFunctor.id_map
           · constructor
             · apply MvFunctor.id_map
             · intro i j; cases i <;> simp [RelLast, TypeVec.RelLast]
               exact ⟨j, rfl, rfl⟩
         · exact ⟨x, rfl, rfl⟩

    rw [ha, hb, ←MvFunctor.map_map, ←MvFunctor.map_map, Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right]
    apply MvFunctor.map_eq_map_of_liftR (RelLast _ R)
    · exact hR _ _ Rab
    · intro i x y hxy
      cases i
      · simp [RelLast, TypeVec.RelLast] at hxy; simp [G, hxy]
      · simp [RelLast] at hxy
        simp [G, TypeVec.appendFun]
        apply congr_arg; apply (CShrink.equivShrink _).symm.injective; apply StateCofixFinal.equivCofix.injective
        dsimp
        apply MvQPF.Cofix.bisim (fun u v => ∃ x y, u = Cofix.corec U.dest' x ∧ v = Cofix.corec U.dest' y ∧ R x y)
        · rintro _ _ ⟨x, y, rfl, rfl, hr⟩
          rw [Cofix.dest_corec, Cofix.dest_corec]
          have := hR _ _ hr
          rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at this
          rcases this with ⟨w, h1, h2, h3⟩
          rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff]
          use w
          simp [h1, h2]
          intro i j
          cases i
          · specialize h3 0 j; simp [RelLast, TypeVec.RelLast] at h3; exact h3
          · specialize h3 1 j; simp [RelLast] at h3; exact ⟨_, _, rfl, rfl, h3⟩
        · exact ⟨x, y, rfl, rfl, hxy⟩

  Quot.lift f h (toLarge self)

obtain ⟨R, hR, hRs⟩ := h_bisim
    let g (x : a.σ ⊕ b.σ) := StateCofixShrunk.corec un x
    have hg : ∀ x y, R x y → g x = g y := by
      intro x y h
      apply congr_arg; apply Quot.sound; use R, hR, h
    have ha : ∀ s, ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec a.dest' s)) = g (inl s) := by
      intro s
      apply congr_arg; apply Quot.sound; use fun x y => y = Sum.inl x
      constructor
      · intro x y h; rw [h]; simp [union_dest_eq_left]
        rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff]; use (TypeVec.id ::: fun x => (x, Sum.inl x)) <$$> a.dest' x
        simp [MvFunctor.map_map, -TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id]
        constructor <;> try { rfl }
        intro i; cases i <;> simp [RelLast]
      · rfl
    have hb : ∀ s, ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec b.dest' s)) = g (inr s) := by
      intro s
      apply congr_arg; apply Quot.sound; use fun x y => y = Sum.inr x
      constructor
      · intro x y h; rw [h]; simp [union_dest_eq_right]
        rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff]; use (TypeVec.id ::: fun x => (x, Sum.inr x)) <$$> b.dest' x
        simp [MvFunctor.map_map, -TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id]
        constructor <;> try { rfl }
        intro i; cases i <;> simp [RelLast]
      · rfl
    simp only [ha, hb]
    rw [← union_dest_eq_left a b, ← union_dest_eq_right a b]
    rw [← MvFunctor.map_map, ← MvFunctor.map_map]
    congr 1
    have h_lift := hR _ _ hRs
    rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_lift
    obtain ⟨z, h1, h2, h3⟩ := h_lift
    rw [← h1, ← h2, MvFunctor.map_map, MvFunctor.map_map]
    congr 1; funext i; cases i
    · rfl
    · simp only [Function.comp_apply, TypeVec.appendFun_apply_1]; apply hg; apply h3
  Quot.lift f h (toLarge self)

rw [←MvFunctor.map_map, ←Coalg.union_dest_eq_left]
      
    conv_rhs =>
      apply MvFunctor.congr_arg (TypeVec.id ::: fun s => g (.inr s))
      · intro i; cases i <;> simp [h_embed_b, StateCofixFinal.corec, corec]
      rw [←MvFunctor.map_map, ←Coalg.union_dest_eq_right]

    apply MvFunctor.map_eq_map_of_liftR (hR _ _ hinit)
    rintro i j (rfl | hij)
    · rfl
    · simp [g]; apply congr_arg; apply Quot.sound; exact ⟨R, hR, hij⟩
    
  CShrink.ofLarge <| Quot.lift f h (CShrink.toLarge self)

apply congr_arg; apply Quot.sound
      use fun x y => ∃ u, x = Coalg.corec a.dest' u ∧ y = Coalg.corec (a.union b).dest' (.inl u)
      constructor
      · rintro _ _ ⟨u, rfl, rfl⟩
        simp only [Coalg.dest, Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, MvFunctor.map_map, ←TypeVec.comp_assoc, ←TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id]
        apply (MvFunctor.LiftR_map_iff _ _ _ _).mpr
        apply MvFunctor.LiftR_imp (R := Eq)
        · rintro i x y rfl; cases i <;> simp; exact ⟨_, rfl, rfl⟩
        · apply MvFunctor.LiftR_refl
      · exact ⟨s, rfl, rfl⟩
    have h_right (s : b.σ) : StateCofixShrunk.corec b.dest' s = G (.inr s) := by
      apply congr_arg; apply Quot.sound
      use fun x y => ∃ u, x = Coalg.corec b.dest' u ∧ y = Coalg.corec (a.union b).dest' (.inr u)
      constructor
      · rintro _ _ ⟨u, rfl, rfl⟩
        simp only [Coalg.dest, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right, MvFunctor.map_map, ←TypeVec.comp_assoc, ←TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id]
        apply (MvFunctor.LiftR_map_iff _ _ _ _).mpr
        apply MvFunctor.LiftR_imp (R := Eq)
        · rintro i x y rfl; cases i <;> simp; exact ⟨_, rfl, rfl⟩
        · apply MvFunctor.LiftR_refl
      · exact ⟨s, rfl, rfl⟩
    simp only [f, Coalg.dest]
    conv => lhs; simp only [h_left, MvFunctor.map_map, ←TypeVec.comp_assoc, ←TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id, Coalg.union_dest_eq_left]
    conv => rhs; simp only [h_right, MvFunctor.map_map, ←TypeVec.comp_assoc, ←TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right]
    apply MvFunctor.map_eq_map_of_liftR (hR _ _ Rab)
    rintro i x y hxy; cases i <;> simp at hxy ⊢; [subst hxy; rfl, exact h_eq _ _ hxy]
  Quot.lift f h (toLarge self)

cases i
      · simp at huv; subst huv; rfl
      · simp at huv; apply hg; exact huv

congr; funext s; congr 1
      apply Quot.sound; use fun u v => v = .inl u
      constructor
      · intro u v h; subst h
        rw [Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, MvQPF.liftR_iff]
        exists a.dest' u
        simp [RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun_last]
        intros; trivial
      · rfl
    have hb : f b = (TypeVec.id ::: K) <$$> un (.inr b.s) := by
      rw [← h_un]
      simp only [f, K, Coalg.dest, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right, map_map, StateCofixShrunk.corec, StateCofixFinal.corec]
      congr; funext s; congr 1
      apply Quot.sound; use fun u v => v = .inr u
      constructor
      · intro u v h; subst h
        rw [Coalg.union_dest_eq_right, MvQPF.liftR_iff]
        exists b.dest' u
        simp [RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun_last]
        intros; trivial
      · rfl
    rw [ha, hb]
    apply MvFunctor.map_eq_map_of_liftR (R := RelLast _ R)
    · rw [← h_un] at hR
      apply hR _ _ hRab
    · intro i x y hxy
      cases i using Fin.lastCases
      · apply hxy
      · simp only [RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun_last] at hxy ⊢
        simp only [K, StateCofixShrunk.corec, StateCofixFinal.corec]
        congr 1
        apply Quot.sound
        use R
        exact ⟨hR, hxy⟩
  Quot.lift f h (CShrink.toLarge self)

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR, Rab⟩
    let g (x : a.σ ⊕ b.σ) : StateCofixShrunk F α := .ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec un x))
    let h (x : a.σ ⊕ b.σ) := (TypeVec.id ::: g) <$$> un x
    have h_map (x y : a.σ ⊕ b.σ) (hr : R x y) : h x = h y := by
      simp only [h, g]
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at hR
      rcases hR x y hr with ⟨z, h1, h2, h3⟩
      rw [←h1, ←h2, MvFunctor.map_map, MvFunctor.map_map]
      congr 1
      funext i p; cases i <;> simp only [comp_app, id_eq, TypeVec.id, TypeVec.appendFun_eq_left, TypeVec.appendFun_eq_right]
      · apply congr_arg; apply Quot.sound; use R, hR, (h3 _ _ p)
    have h_a : (TypeVec.id ::: fun s => .ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec a.dest' s))) <$$> a.dest' a.s = h (.inl a.s) := by
      simp only [h, g]
      rw [← MvFunctor.map_map]
      congr 1
      · funext s; apply congr_arg; apply Quot.sound
        use fun x y => y = .inl x
        constructor
        · intro x y heq; subst heq; rw [h_un]; dsimp; rw [Coalg.union_dest_eq_left]
          rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff]
          use (MvFunctor.map (fun i x => (x, (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inl) i x)) (a.dest' x))
          simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, abs_map, abs_repr]
          constructor <;> try { rfl }
          intros i j; cases i <;> simp
        · rfl
      · rw [h_un]; dsimp; apply Coalg.union_dest_eq_left
    have h_b : (TypeVec.id ::: fun s => .ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec b.dest' s))) <$$> b.dest' b.s = h (.inr b.s) := by
      simp only [h, g]
      rw [← MvFunctor.map_map]
      congr 1
      · funext s; apply congr_arg; apply Quot.sound
        use fun x y => y = .inr x
        constructor
        · intro x y heq; subst heq; rw [h_un]; dsimp; rw [Coalg.union_dest_eq_right]
          rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff]
          use (MvFunctor.map (fun i x => (x, (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inr) i x)) (b.dest' x))
          simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, abs_map, abs_repr]
          constructor <;> try { rfl }
          intros i j; cases i <;> simp
        · rfl
      · rw [h_un]; dsimp; apply Coalg.union_dest_eq_right
    rw [h_a, h_b]
    apply h_map _ _ Rab
  Quot.lift f h (toLarge self)

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR, Rab⟩
    have h_lift := hR _ _ Rab
    rw [union_dest_eq_left, union_dest_eq_right] at h_lift
    let k : (a.union b).σ → StateCofixShrunk F α := fun
      | .inl s => .ofLarge <| Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec a.dest' s)
      | .inr s => .ofLarge <| Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec b.dest' s)
    change map (TypeVec.id ::: k ∘ Sum.inl) (a.dest' a.s) = map (TypeVec.id ::: k ∘ Sum.inr) (b.dest' b.s)
    rw [←MvFunctor.map_map, ←MvFunctor.map_map]
    apply MvFunctor.map_eq_map_of_liftR (RelLast _ R)
    · intro i x y hxy
      cases i using Fin2.cases
      · simp only [RelLast] at hxy; simp [hxy]
      · simp only [RelLast] at hxy
        dsimp [k]
        cases x <;> cases y <;> apply congr_arg StateCofixShrunk.ofLarge <;> apply Quot.sound
        <;> refine ⟨_, ?_, hxy⟩
        · intro u v h; have := hR _ _ h; rw [union_dest_eq_left, union_dest_eq_left] at this
          exact MvFunctor.LiftR_imp (fun _ _ => by simp_all [RelLast]) this
        · intro u v h; have := hR _ _ h; rw [union_dest_eq_left, union_dest_eq_right] at this
          exact MvFunctor.LiftR_imp (fun _ _ => by simp_all [RelLast]) this
        · intro u v h; have := hR _ _ h; rw [union_dest_eq_right, union_dest_eq_left] at this
          exact MvFunctor.LiftR_imp (fun _ _ => by simp_all [RelLast]) this
        · intro u v h; have := hR _ _ h; rw [union_dest_eq_right, union_dest_eq_right] at this
          exact MvFunctor.LiftR_imp (fun _ _ => by simp_all [RelLast]) this
    · exact h_lift
  Quot.lift f h (toLarge self)

rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_lift
    rcases h_lift with ⟨z, hzl, hzr, hzrel⟩
    rw [←hzl, ←hzr, MvFunctor.map_map, MvFunctor.map_map]
    congr with i x
    cases i <;> dsimp
    · rfl
    · apply hk; apply hzrel
  Quot.lift f h self

rw [←TypeVec.comp_assoc, ←TypeVec.map_comp, Coalg.union_dest_eq_left]
    rw [←TypeVec.comp_assoc (g := TypeVec.id ::: g), ←TypeVec.map_comp, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right]
    apply MvFunctor.map_eq_map_of_liftR (RelLast _ R)
    · exact hR _ _ hRs
    · intro i x y h
      cases i using Fin.lastCases
      · simp at h; subst h; rfl
      · simp at h; unfold g; congr 1; apply Quot.sound
        exact ⟨R, hR, h⟩
  Quot.lift f h (toLarge self)

· rfl
      · rfl
    rw [ha, hb]
    apply MvQPF.map_eq_map_of_liftR _ _ (hR _ _ hab)
    rintro _ _ (rfl|h)
    · rfl
    · simp only [k, TypeVec.appendFun_apply_app]
      exact congr_arg _ (Quot.sound ⟨R, hR, h⟩)
  Quot.lift f h (toLarge self)
(self.toLarge)

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR, Rab⟩
    let G : un.σ → StateCofixShrunk F α := fun s => match s with
      | .inl s => .ofLarge <| Quot.mk _ <| Coalg.corec a.dest' s
      | .inr s => .ofLarge <| Quot.mk _ <| Coalg.corec b.dest' s
    
    have embed_a : ∀ x, G (.inl x) = .ofLarge (Quot.mk _ <| Coalg.corec un.dest' (.inl x)) := by
      intro x; apply congr_arg; apply Quot.sound
      use fun u v => v = Sum.inl u
      constructor
      · introv h; subst h; rw [Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, MvQPF.liftR_iff]
        refine ⟨(TypeVec.id ::: fun k => (k, Sum.inl k)) <$$> a.dest' u, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
        · simp [MvFunctor.map_map]
        · simp [MvFunctor.map_map]
        · intro i; simp [MvFunctor.map_map, RelLast]; cases i <;> simp
      · rfl

    have embed_b : ∀ x, G (.inr x) = .ofLarge (Quot.mk _ <| Coalg.corec un.dest' (.inr x)) := by
      intro x; apply congr_arg; apply Quot.sound
      use fun u v => v = Sum.inr u
      constructor
      · introv h; subst h; rw [Coalg.union_dest_eq_right, MvQPF.liftR_iff]
        refine ⟨(TypeVec.id ::: fun k => (k, Sum.inr k)) <$$> b.dest' u, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
        · simp [MvFunctor.map_map]
        · simp [MvFunctor.map_map]
        · intro i; simp [MvFunctor.map_map, RelLast]; cases i <;> simp
      · rfl

    rw [Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right]
    rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at hR; specialize hR _ _ Rab; rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at hR
    rcases hR with ⟨z, h1, h2, h3⟩
    rw [←h1, ←h2, MvFunctor.map_map, MvFunctor.map_map]
    congr 1; ext i x
    cases i using Fin.lastCases
    · simp
    · simp; let ⟨u, v⟩ := x.val; have hr := x.property
      cases u <;> cases v
      · rw [embed_a, embed_a]; apply congr_arg; apply Quot.sound; exact ⟨R, ⟨fun _ _ => h_bisim.choose_spec.1 _ _, hr⟩⟩
      · rw [embed_a, embed_b]; apply congr_arg; apply Quot.sound; exact ⟨R, ⟨fun _ _ => h_bisim.choose_spec.1 _ _, hr⟩⟩
      · rw [embed_b, embed_a]; apply congr_arg; apply Quot.sound; exact ⟨R, ⟨fun _ _ => h_bisim.choose_spec.1 _ _, hr⟩⟩
      · rw [embed_b, embed_b]; apply congr_arg; apply Quot.sound; exact ⟨R, ⟨fun _ _ => h_bisim.choose_spec.1 _ _, hr⟩⟩
  Quot.lift f h self

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR, Rab⟩
    have h := hR _ _ Rab
    rw [← Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, ← Coalg.union_dest_eq_right] at h
    rw [MvQPF.liftR_map_iff_liftR] at h
    refine MvFunctor.map_eq_map_of_liftR (MvQPF.LiftR_mono ?_ h)
    intro i x y hxy
    cases i
    · simp only [TypeVec.appendFun_fz] at hxy ⊢
      dsimp
      congr 1
      apply Quot.sound
      use R
      exact ⟨hR, hxy⟩
    · simp only [TypeVec.appendFun_fs, id_eq] at hxy ⊢
      exact hxy
  Quot.lift f h (toLarge self)

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR, hpair⟩
    let g (s : (a.union b).σ) := StateCofixShrunk.ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec un s))
    have hg : ∀ s t, R s t → g s = g t := by
      intro s t hst; simp only [g]; apply congrArg; apply Quot.sound
      subst h_un; use R
    have h_map (c : Coalg F α) (inj : c.σ → (a.union b).σ)
      (hinj : ∀ s, (TypeVec.id ::: inj) <$$> c.dest' s = un (inj s)) :
      map (TypeVec.id ::: fun init => StateCofixShrunk.ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec c.dest' init))) (c.dest' c.s) =
      map (TypeVec.id ::: g) (un (inj c.s)) := by
      rw [←hinj, MvFunctor.map_map]
      congr; funext i x; cases i <;> simp
      simp only [g]; apply congrArg; apply Quot.sound
      subst h_un
      use fun s1 s2 => ∃ s, s1 = s ∧ s2 = inj s
      constructor
      · rintro _ _ ⟨s, rfl, rfl⟩
        rw [←hinj, MvQPF.liftR_iff]
        use (TypeVec.id ::: fun s => (s, inj s)) <$$> c.dest' s
        simp [MvFunctor.map_map]
        constructor <;> { congr; funext i p; cases i <;> simp; rfl }
      · use x; simp
    rw [h_map a Sum.inl (by rw [←h_un]; apply Coalg.union_dest_eq_left),
        h_map b Sum.inr (by rw [←h_un]; apply Coalg.union_dest_eq_right)]
    subst h_un
    rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at hR
    rcases hR _ _ hpair with ⟨z, h1, h2⟩
    rw [←h1, ←h2, MvFunctor.map_map, MvFunctor.map_map]
    congr; funext i p; cases i <;> simp
    apply hg; exact p.2
  Quot.lift f h self.toLarge

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR, hpair⟩
    subst h_un
    let f : _ → _ := fun s =>
      StateCofixShrunk.ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec un s))

    have h_inj (x : F (α ::: _)) (y : F (α ::: a.σ)) (eq : x = map (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inl) y) :
        map (TypeVec.id ::: f) x = map (TypeVec.id ::: fun s => ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec a.dest' s))) y := by
      subst eq; rw [MvFunctor.map_map]; congr; funext i s; cases i using Fin2.cases
      · rfl
      · simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.id, f]; congr 1; apply Quot.sound
        use fun u v => ∃ k, u = Coalg.corec un (Sum.inl k) ∧ v = Coalg.corec a.dest' k
        constructor
        · rintro _ _ ⟨k, rfl, rfl⟩
          simp [Coalg.dest]; rw [Coalg.union_dest_eq_left]
          use map (fun z => ((TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inl) z, z)) (a.dest' k)
          simp [MvFunctor.map_map]
          constructor <;> try rfl
          intros i u v h; cases i <;> cases h <;> try rfl
          exact ⟨_, rfl, rfl⟩
        · exact ⟨s, rfl, rfl⟩

    have h_inj_b (x : F (α ::: _)) (y : F (α ::: b.σ)) (eq : x = map (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inr) y) :
        map (TypeVec.id ::: f) x = map (TypeVec.id ::: fun s => ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec b.dest' s))) y := by
      subst eq; rw [MvFunctor.map_map]; congr; funext i s; cases i using Fin2.cases
      · rfl
      · simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.id, f]; congr 1; apply Quot.sound
        use fun u v => ∃ k, u = Coalg.corec un (Sum.inr k) ∧ v = Coalg.corec b.dest' k
        constructor
        · rintro _ _ ⟨k, rfl, rfl⟩
          simp [Coalg.dest]; rw [Coalg.union_dest_eq_right]
          use map (fun z => ((TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inr) z, z)) (b.dest' k)
          simp [MvFunctor.map_map]
          constructor <;> try rfl
          intros i u v h; cases i <;> cases h <;> try rfl
          exact ⟨_, rfl, rfl⟩
        · exact ⟨s, rfl, rfl⟩

    rw [← h_inj _ _ (Coalg.union_dest_eq_left _ _ _)]
    rw [← h_inj_b _ _ (Coalg.union_dest_eq_right _ _ _)]
    apply MvQPF.map_eq_map_of_liftR F (R := RelLast _ R)
    · simp only [IsBisim] at hR; apply hR; exact hpair
    · intro i u v h; cases i using Fin2.cases
      · cases h; rfl
      · simp only [RelLast] at h; simp only [f]; congr 1; apply Quot.sound; use R; exact ⟨hR, h⟩
  have h_surj : Function.Surjective (.ofLarge (α := StateCofixFinal F α)) := by
    intro x
    use .toLarge x
    simp [StateCofixShrunk.ofLarge, StateCofixShrunk.toLarge]
  Quot.lift f h (h_surj self).choose
h (toLarge self)

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR, hRab⟩
    let u := a.union b
    let k : u.σ → StateCofixShrunk F α := fun s => match s with
      | .inl s => .ofLarge <| .corec a.dest' s
      | .inr s => .ofLarge <| .corec b.dest' s
    rw [←TypeVec.comp_id_append_comp_map (g := k ∘ Sum.inl),
        ←TypeVec.comp_id_append_comp_map (g := k ∘ Sum.inr)]
    rw [Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right]
    apply MvFunctor.map_eq_map_of_liftR (RelLast α R)
    · exact hRab
    · intro i x y hxy
      cases i with | fs => rfl | fz =>
      simp only [k]; simp only at hxy
      congr 1; apply Quot.sound
      have ha (s) : Coalg.corec a.dest' s ~ Coalg.corec u.dest' (.inl s) := by
        use fun c d => ∃ s, c = Coalg.corec a.dest' s ∧ d = Coalg.corec u.dest' (.inl s)
        refine ⟨_, ?_, _, rfl, rfl⟩
        rintro _ _ ⟨s, rfl, rfl⟩
        simp only [Coalg.dest, Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, MvQPF.liftR_iff, MvFunctor.map_map]
        use MvFunctor.map (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inl) (a.dest' s)
        simp only [MvFunctor.map_map]; constructor; rfl; constructor; rfl
        intros i _; cases i <;> simp; exact fun s => ⟨s, rfl, rfl⟩
      have hb (s) : Coalg.corec b.dest' s ~ Coalg.corec u.dest' (.inr s) := by
        use fun c d => ∃ s, c = Coalg.corec b.dest' s ∧ d = Coalg.corec u.dest' (.inr s)
        refine ⟨_, ?_, _, rfl, rfl⟩
        rintro _ _ ⟨s, rfl, rfl⟩
        simp only [Coalg.dest, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right, MvQPF.liftR_iff, MvFunctor.map_map]
        use MvFunctor.map (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inr) (b.dest' s)
        simp only [MvFunctor.map_map]; constructor; rfl; constructor; rfl
        intros i _; cases i <;> simp; exact fun s => ⟨s, rfl, rfl⟩
      have hu (s t) (hr : R s t) : Coalg.corec u.dest' s ~ Coalg.corec u.dest' t := by
        use fun c d => ∃ s t, R s t ∧ c = Coalg.corec u.dest' s ∧ d = Coalg.corec u.dest' t
        refine ⟨_, ?_, _, _, hr, rfl, rfl⟩
        rintro _ _ ⟨s, t, hr, rfl, rfl⟩
        simp only [Coalg.dest]; specialize hR s t hr
        apply MvQPF.LiftR_mono _ hR
        intros i _ _ h; cases i <;> simp at h ⊢; exact ⟨_, _, h, rfl, rfl⟩
      cases x <;> cases y
      · refine Eq.trans (Quot.sound (ha _)) (Eq.trans (Quot.sound (hu _ _ hxy)) (Quot.sound (ha _)).symm)
      · refine Eq.trans (Quot.sound (ha _)) (Eq.trans (Quot.sound (hu _ _ hxy)) (Quot.sound (hb _)).symm)
      · refine Eq.trans (Quot.sound (hb _)) (Eq.trans (Quot.sound (hu _ _ hxy)) (Quot.sound (ha _)).symm)
      · refine Eq.trans (Quot.sound (hb _)) (Eq.trans (Quot.sound (hu _ _ hxy)) (Quot.sound (hb _)).symm)
  Quot.lift f h self.toLarge

· rfl
      · apply congr_arg; apply Quot.sound
        use fun | .inl x, .inr y => y = .inr x | _, _ => False
        constructor
        · intro x y h; dsimp at h; split at h <;> try contradiction; subst h
          simp only [Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right]
          rw [← MvFunctor.liftR_map_right_iff]
          · apply MvFunctor.LiftR.refl
          · intro i j h; cases i <;> cases j <;> simp [TypeVec.RelLast] at h ⊢ <;> subst h <;> rfl
        · simp

    rw [ha, hb]
    apply MvFunctor.map_eq_map_of_liftR (S := TypeVec.RelLast R)
    · apply hR _ _ hInit
    · intro x y h
      cases x <;> cases y <;> simp [TypeVec.RelLast] at h ⊢
      · subst h; rfl
      · apply hk _ _ h
  Quot.lift f h (toLarge self)

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, h_bisim, h_R⟩
    let U := a.union b
    let H (s : U.σ) : StateCofixShrunk F α := .ofLarge <| Quot.mk _ { U with s := s }
    have h_respects : ∀ s t, R s t → H s = H t := by
      intro s t hr
      apply congr_arg
      apply Quot.sound
      use R
    have h_embed {c d : Coalg F α} (f : c.σ → d.σ)
        (hf : ∀ s, d.dest' (f s) = map (id ::: f) (c.dest' s)) (s : c.σ) :
        Quot.mk (Bisim (F:=F) (α:=α)) {c with s := s} = Quot.mk _ {d with s := f s} := by
      apply Quot.sound
      use fun x y => y = f x
      constructor
      · intro u v heq; subst heq; rw [hf]; rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff]
        let r := repr (c.dest' u)
        use r.fst, r.snd, ((id ::: f) ⊚ r.snd)
        simp only [abs_repr, abs_map, r]; refine ⟨rfl, rfl, ?_⟩
        intro i j; simp only [Comp.comp, id]; cases (r.snd i j) <;> simp
      · rfl
    have hL : map (id ::: fun x => .ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec a.dest' x))) (a.dest' a.s) =
              map (id ::: H) (U.dest' (.inl a.s)) := by
      simp only [U, Coalg.union, map_map, H]; congr; ext x; simp only [Comp.comp, id]
      apply h_embed; intro s; rfl
    have hR : map (id ::: fun x => .ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec b.dest' x))) (b.dest' b.s) =
              map (id ::: H) (U.dest' (.inr b.s)) := by
      simp only [U, Coalg.union, map_map, H]; congr; ext x; simp only [Comp.comp, id]
      apply h_embed; intro s; rfl
    rw [hL, hR]
    have h_lift := h_bisim _ _ h_R
    rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_lift
    rcases h_lift with ⟨a, f, g, hx, hy, hrel⟩
    rw [hx, hy, abs_map, abs_map]; congr 1; simp only; congr; ext i j
    specialize hrel i j
    cases h : (f i j)
    · cases hrel; rfl
    · cases hrel; apply h_respects; assumption
  Quot.lift f h self.toLarge

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR, hRab⟩
    let toCofix := @StateCofixFinal.toCofix n F _ α
    let ofCofix := @StateCofixFinal.ofCofix n F _ α
    have h_map (c : Coalg F α) :
        map (TypeVec.id ::: fun init => StateCofixShrunk.ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec c.dest' init))) (c.dest' c.s) =
        map (TypeVec.id ::: StateCofixShrunk.ofLarge ∘ ofCofix) (Cofix.dest (Coalg.toCofix c)) := by
      rw [MvQPF.Cofix.dest_corec, MvFunctor.map_map]
      congr
      funext x
      cases x <;> try rfl
      simp only [Function.comp_apply]
      apply congr_arg
      apply Quot.sound
      rw [← StateCofixFinal.equivCofix.apply_eq_iff_eq]
      simp only [StateCofixFinal.equivCofix, Equiv.coe_fn_mk, StateCofixFinal.toCofix_ofCofix]
      rfl
    rw [h_map a, h_map b]
    congr 2
    exact congr_arg toCofix (Quot.sound ⟨R, hR, hRab⟩)
  Quot.lift f h (StateCofixShrunk.toLarge self)

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR, hRs⟩
    let g (s : a.σ ⊕ b.σ) : StateCofixShrunk F α := .ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec un s))
    
    have h_map (c : Coalg F α) (inj : c.σ → a.σ ⊕ b.σ) 
        (h_inj : ∀ s, un (inj s) = (TypeVec.id ::: inj) <$$> c.dest' s) :
        map (TypeVec.id ::: fun init => .ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec c.dest' init))) (c.dest' c.s) = 
        (TypeVec.id ::: g) <$$> un (inj c.s) := by
      rw [h_inj, MvFunctor.map_map]
      apply MvFunctor.map_congr
      intro i x; cases i using Fin.lastCases
      · rfl
      · dsimp [g]
        apply congrArg; apply Quot.sound
        use fun u v => v = inj u
        constructor
        · intro u v h; rw [h, h_inj, MvQPF.liftR_iff]
          exists (TypeVec.id ::: inj) <$$> c.dest' u
          simp [MvFunctor.map_map]; constructor <;> rfl
        · rfl

    rw [h_un] at hR union_dest_eq_left union_dest_eq_right
    dsimp at hR union_dest_eq_left union_dest_eq_right

    rw [h_map a Sum.inl (union_dest_eq_left _ _), h_map b Sum.inr (union_dest_eq_right _ _)]

    have hLift := hR _ _ hRs
    rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at hLift
    rcases hLift with ⟨z, hleft, hright⟩
    rw [←hleft, ←hright]
    repeat rw [MvFunctor.map_map]
    apply MvFunctor.map_congr
    intro i x; cases i using Fin.lastCases
    · rfl
    · dsimp [g]
      apply congrArg; apply Quot.sound
      use R
      exact ⟨hR, x.property⟩
  Quot.lift f h (StateCofixShrunk.toLarge self)

rw [h_un] at h_bisim
    rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR_bisim, hR_root⟩
    let g (s : a.σ ⊕ b.σ) : StateCofixShrunk F α := match s with
      | .inl s => .ofLarge <| Quot.mk _ <| Coalg.corec a.dest' s
      | .inr s => .ofLarge <| Quot.mk _ <| Coalg.corec b.dest' s
    have h_lhs : map (TypeVec.id ::: fun init => .ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec a.dest' init))) (a.dest' a.s)
               = map (TypeVec.id ::: g) (map (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inl) (a.dest' a.s)) := by
      rw [MvFunctor.map_map]; congr; funext i x; cases i using Fin.lastCases <;> simp [g]
    have h_rhs : map (TypeVec.id ::: fun init => .ofLarge (Quot.mk _ (Coalg.corec b.dest' init))) (b.dest' b.s)
               = map (TypeVec.id ::: g) (map (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inr) (b.dest' b.s)) := by
      rw [MvFunctor.map_map]; congr; funext i x; cases i using Fin.lastCases <;> simp [g]
    rw [h_lhs, h_rhs]
    have h_lift : LiftR (RelLast _ R) (map (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inl) (a.dest' a.s)) (map (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inr) (b.dest' b.s)) := by
      specialize hR_bisim _ _ hR_root; rw [← h_un] at hR_bisim; exact hR_bisim
    rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_lift
    rcases h_lift with ⟨z, h_z_a, h_z_b, h_z_rel⟩
    rw [← h_z_a, ← h_z_b, MvFunctor.map_map, MvFunctor.map_map]
    congr; funext i x; specialize h_z_rel i x
    cases i using Fin.lastCases
    · simp only [comp_apply, TypeVec.id, Matrix.cons_val_last]
      simp only [TypeVec.RelLast, TypeVec.to_last, Matrix.cons_val_last] at h_z_rel
      simp only [g]; apply congrArg; apply Quot.sound
      rw [Coalg.Bisim]; use R; constructor
      · rw [← h_un] at hR_bisim; convert hR_bisim
      · exact h_z_rel
    · simp only [comp_apply, TypeVec.id, Matrix.cons_val_fin_cons]
      simp only [TypeVec.RelLast, TypeVec.to_drop, Matrix.cons_val_fin_cons] at h_z_rel
      exact h_z_rel
  let res := Quot.lift f h (CShrink.toLarge self)
  CShrink.ofLarge res

· intro i x y h
      cases i <;> simp only [RelLast] at h
      · subst h; rfl
      · exact hg _ _ h
    · exact hR _ _ hRa
  CShrink.ofLarge <| Quot.lift (fun x => f x) h self.toLarge
